title: TrustLens evidence strength
description: How far the evidence behind a finding reaches. Ordered weakest to strongest for the purpose of graph-edge composition ONLY (a derived edge takes the MINIMUM strength of its inputs). This ordering is not a risk ranking and must not be rendered as one.

x-trustlens-semantics.DECLARED_ONLY: The artifact or operator says so. No independent check.
x-trustlens-semantics.INFERRED: Concluded by TrustLens from other records rather than read from evidence. Must name what it was inferred from.
x-trustlens-semantics.CONFIG_DERIVED: Read from a supplied configuration or environment description, which may be stale or wrong.
x-trustlens-semantics.STATIC_MATCH: A construct was found in parsed source. It exists in the file; whether it executes is not established.
x-trustlens-semantics.STATIC_DATAFLOW: A source-to-sink flow was found in parsed source. Stronger, still not a runtime claim.
x-trustlens-semantics.DIRECT_OBSERVATION: Recorded during an actual execution under a recorded sandbox profile. Establishes what happened in that run, and nothing about other runs or other inputs.
